mapper.select: SELECT id as "id", product_id as "productId", product_name as "productName", customer_id as "customerId", customer_name as "customerName", order_id as "orderId", rating as "rating", title as "title", body as "body", verified_purchase as "verifiedPurchase", helpful_count as "helpfulCount", report_count as "reportCount", moderator_notes as "moderatorNotes", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", created_at as "createdAt" FROM hm_query.fact_reviews_flat WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT state_id as "stateId", count(*) as "count" FROM hm_query.fact_reviews_flat GROUP BY state_id
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.fact_reviews_flat WHERE state_id = 'FLAGGED' AND product_id = #{productId}

SELECT id as "id", product_id as "productId", product_name as "productName", customer_id as "customerId", customer_name as "customerName", rating as "rating", title as "title", report_count as "reportCount", moderator_notes as "moderatorNotes", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", created_at as "createdAt" FROM hm_query.fact_reviews_flat WHERE state_id = 'FLAGGED' AND product_id = #{productId} ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.fact_reviews_flat WHERE state_id IN ('UNDER_MODERATION', 'FLAGGED') AND state_id = #{stateId}

SELECT id as "id", product_id as "productId", product_name as "productName", customer_id as "customerId", customer_name as "customerName", rating as "rating", title as "title", body as "body", verified_purchase as "verifiedPurchase", report_count as "reportCount", moderator_notes as "moderatorNotes", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", created_at as "createdAt" FROM hm_query.fact_reviews_flat WHERE state_id IN ('UNDER_MODERATION', 'FLAGGED') AND state_id = #{stateId} ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.fact_reviews_flat WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND state_id = 'PUBLISHED'

SELECT id as "id", product_id as "productId", customer_id as "customerId", customer_name as "customerName", rating as "rating", title as "title", body as "body", verified_purchase as "verifiedPurchase", helpful_count as "helpfulCount", state_id as "stateId", created_at as "createdAt" FROM hm_query.fact_reviews_flat WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND state_id = 'PUBLISHED' ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT product_id as "productId", ROUND(AVG(rating::numeric), 2) as "averageRating", count(*) as "reviewCount" FROM hm_query.fact_reviews_flat WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND state_id = 'PUBLISHED' GROUP BY product_id
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.fact_reviews_flat WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND state_id = 'PUBLISHED'

SELECT id as "id", product_id as "productId", customer_id as "customerId", customer_name as "customerName", rating as "rating", title as "title", body as "body", verified_purchase as "verifiedPurchase", helpful_count as "helpfulCount", created_at as "createdAt" FROM hm_query.fact_reviews_flat WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND state_id = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY created_at DESC ${pagination}
